Name: Base64 Decode
Description: Decode a base64 string and write the binary result to a file in the staging directory. The source string can come from a state address or from a direct value.

SettingsInputs.Name: Source
SettingsInputs.Description: Base64-encoded string to decode (or state address containing it)

SettingsInputs.Name: FilePath
SettingsInputs.Description: Output file path in staging to write decoded binary

StateOutputs.Name: LocalPath
StateOutputs.Description: Absolute path to the decoded file

StateOutputs.Name: DecodedBytes
StateOutputs.Description: Size of the decoded file in bytes
